title: Crispy Fried Chicken
description: A classic Saudi dish with a crispy exterior and juicy interior. This recipe is a staple in many Saudi households.
instructions: Marinate the chicken breast in a mixture of flour, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the sesame oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Dredge the marinated chicken breast in all-purpose flour and shake off excess.
Fry the chicken breast in the sesame oil until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the chicken from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Garnish with crispy sesame and serve hot.
